Dealership.title: Dealership
Dealership.description: Represents an approved and active motorcycle dealership listed in the Moto Trust application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Dealership entity.

name.description: The official name of the dealership.

brand.description: The primary motorcycle brand associated with the dealership.

types.description: A list of types indicating the dealership's affiliation or business model (e.g., Official, Independent, Partner).

services.description: A list of services offered by the dealership (e.g., Sales, Repair, Rental).

address.description: The physical street address of the dealership.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the dealership.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude coordinate of the dealership's location.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude coordinate of the dealership's location.

openNow.description: Indicates whether the dealership is currently open for business.

stockCount.description: The current number of motorcycles in stock at the dealership.

rating.description: The average customer rating of the dealership, typically on a scale (e.g., 1-5).

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a user review or comment on a dealership.

AdvicePost.title: AdvicePost
AdvicePost.description: Represents an article or blog post providing advice and information related to motorcycles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AdvicePost entity.

title.description: The title of the advice post.

category.description: The category to which the advice post belongs (e.g., Maintenance, Riding Tips, Gear).

summary.description: A brief summary or excerpt of the advice post content.

readTime.description: An estimate of the time required to read the post (e.g., '5 min read').

date.description: The publication date and time of the advice post.

ProfessionalProfile.title: ProfessionalProfile
ProfessionalProfile.description: Represents a professional user account, typically a dealership owner or manager, who can submit new dealerships.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProfessionalProfile entity.

email.description: The professional's email address, used for contact and login (assumed external auth system handles actual login).

firstName.description: The first name of the professional user.

lastName.description: The last name of the professional user.

companyName.description: The name of the company or organization the professional user represents (optional).

phone.description: The contact phone number for the professional user (optional).

StandardProfile.title: StandardProfile
StandardProfile.description: Represents a standard, non-professional user account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StandardProfile entity, matching the user's Auth UID.

DealershipSubmission.title: DealershipSubmission
DealershipSubmission.description: Represents a submitted application for a new motorcycle dealership by a professional user, pending review and approval.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DealershipSubmission entity.

professionalId.description: Reference to the ProfessionalProfile entity that submitted this dealership application. (Relationship: ProfessionalProfile 1:N DealershipSubmission)

name.description: The proposed name of the dealership.

brand.description: The primary motorcycle brand proposed for the dealership.

types.description: A list of proposed types indicating the dealership's affiliation or business model.

services.description: A list of proposed services offered by the dealership.

address.description: The proposed physical street address of the dealership.

phone.description: The proposed contact phone number for the dealership.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude coordinate of the proposed dealership's location.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude coordinate of the proposed dealership's location.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the dealership application was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the dealership application (e.g., PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).

notes.description: Internal notes or comments regarding the review of the dealership submission (optional).

definition.description: Stores the profiles of professional users.
Stores the profiles of standard users.
Stores approved and active motorcycle dealerships.
